Tested on Intel HD530 (aka Skylake GT2) + drm-stable-kmod (Linux 4.9) + i965/anv (DRI3) + intel (SNA, DRI3) via mpv (EGL + VAAPI), ppsspp (vulkan), rpcs3 (OpenGL 4.3+), firefox (WebRender).
